test.create_query: CREATE TABLE window_test_fast(id Int64, value Int64, partition Int64, msg String) Engine=MergeTree ORDER BY id
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO window_test_fast SELECT number, rand(1) % 500, number % 3000, randomPrintableASCII(2) FROM numbers(1500000)
test.query: SELECT id, AVG(value) OVER (ORDER BY id ROWS BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND 1 FOLLOWING) AS frame1, MAX(value) OVER (ORDER BY id ROWS BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND 1 FOLLOWING) AS frame2, sipHash64(frame1), sipHash64(frame2) FROM window_test_fast

SELECT id AS key, sipHash64(sum(frame)) AS value FROM ( SELECT id, AVG(value) OVER (ORDER BY id ROWS BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND 1 FOLLOWING) AS frame FROM window_test_fast) GROUP BY key ORDER BY key, value

SELECT id % 100000 AS key, sipHash64(sum(frame)) AS value FROM ( SELECT id, AVG(value) OVER (ORDER BY id ROWS BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND 1 FOLLOWING) AS frame FROM window_test_fast) GROUP BY key ORDER BY key, value
SELECT id, AVG(value) OVER (PARTITION by partition ORDER BY id ROWS BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND 1 FOLLOWING) AS frame FROM window_test_fast ORDER BY id
SELECT DISTINCT AVG(value) OVER (PARTITION by partition ORDER BY id ROWS BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND 1 FOLLOWING) AS frame FROM window_test_fast ORDER BY frame
